prompt: Read the files /home/adam/Projects/paloma/bridge/claude-cli.js and /home/adam/Projects/paloma/bridge/codex-cli.js and compare what they export. Tell me the similarities and differences in their module exports.
system: You are a coding assistant with access to the tools listed below. Use them to accomplish the user's request.

tools.name: read_text_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a text file.

tools.name: shell_cat
tools.description: Display file contents using the system cat command.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files matching a text pattern within a directory tree.

pattern.description: Text or regex pattern to search for in file contents

rubric: 1=no tool calls or wrong tools, 2=only reads one file instead of both, 3=reads both files but uses shell_cat instead of read_text_file, 4=uses read_text_file for both files with correct paths, 5=uses read_text_file for both files with exact paths and provides a meaningful comparison of their exports
